subcodes.first_line: O ye servants of the Blessed Beauty! His honor Taraz and his honor 'Alí-Akbar are two luminous lamps of the love of God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بندگان جمال مبارک جناب طراز و حضرت علی اکبر دو سراج محبت الله نامه ای
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @disregarding individual capacity; weakness, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
